form.formComment: Resuming after a 11 weeks break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Oakbank 3yo+ Mdn-Sw January 21 over 1400m, 9 len behind Impact Storm carrying 58kg at $31. On debut ran last of 8 at this track 3yo+ Mdn-Sw December 20 over 1000m, 10 len behind Tobikko carrying 58kg at $101. Prefer to see how he returns.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 7th of 9 at Gawler 3yo Cl1 on January 3 over 1107m, 11 len behind Arabella Star carrying 58.5kg at $15. Will take great benefit from this outing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6.5). Resumes from a spell after only one run when 7th of 9 at Gawler 3yo Cl1 on January 3 over 1107m, 11 len behind Arabella Star carrying 58.5kg at $15. Will take great benefit from this outing.

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding (Magnus - Kim Heaven). He has three recent trials prior to his debut today. Trialled on January 19 at Murray Bridge over 1000m and finished fifth. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding (Magnus - Kim Heaven). He has three recent trials prior to his debut today. Trialled on January 19 at Murray Bridge over 1000m and finished fifth. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last run second last of 10 at Morphettville 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1200m, 10 len behind Tiptop Tori with 56kg at $61. At only start last preparation 9th of 12 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on August 16 over 1000m, on a slow track; 7 len behind Lottie Jane carrying 56kg at $26. No easier this time and happy to leave out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months ran last of 7 at Clare 3yo+ F&M Mdn-Sw on April 4 over 1100m, 5 len behind Southern Monarch with 55.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up 7th of 11 at Gawler 3yo+ F&M Mdn-Sw on October 6 over 1200m, 7 len behind Lady Zelda with 57.5kg at $101. Strips fitter and is among the chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out rounding the home turn.

Raced keenly in the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when 6th of 14 at Morphettville 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on September 3 over 1050m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Dapper Don with 56kg at $19. Capable of a bold return.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 9th of 12 at Strathalbyn 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1200m, 6 len behind Maysoonfly carrying 56kg at $21. Previously second-up 4th of 14 at this track 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on August 2 over 1200m, slow going 1.75 len behind Stolen Kiss carrying 56kg at $18. Can't recommend.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily held up on straightening and shifted in to improve.

form.formComment: Two-year-old gelding (Blue Point - Don'tbabylon) who was bought for AUD $ 80,000 (Magic Millions 2025 Adelaide Yearling Sale). Andrew Gluyas has him ready for this with three recent trials leading in today's debut. Ran 3rd in a Strathalbyn trial over 1000m on March 26. Placed in his latest trial so a bold showing is likely.

form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut came home strongly from last on the turn; 3rd of 9 at this track 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on November 19 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Beyond Mysti carrying 54.5kg at $17. Returned from break ran last of 11 at Morphettville Parks 3yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1250m, 12 len behind City Pro with 55.5kg at $3.90. Strips fitter and is likely to feature.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Flying Artie out of Audacious Heart. Purchased for AUD $ 55,000 (Magic Millions 2024 Adelaide Yearling Sale). Was second in a 1000m trial on March 26 at Strathalbyn. Should measure up.
